channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US Begins Strikes Against Iran After Tehran Downs American Apache Chopper
item.description: US Begins Strikes Against Iran After Tehran Downs American Apache Chopper
item.content:encoded: US Begins Strikes Against Iran After Tehran Downs American Apache Chopper

item.title: Indian-American CEO Facing US Citizenship Loss Over H-1B Visa Fraud

media:content.media:description: Neeraj Sharma became a US citizen in December 2017 after the USCIS approved his application

item.description: According to the Justice Department, Neeraj Sharma submitted 11 fake H-1B visa applications that falsely claimed foreign workers would be placed at a major global financial institution.
item.content:encoded: According to the Justice Department, Neeraj Sharma submitted 11 fake H-1B visa applications that falsely claimed foreign workers would be placed at a major global financial institution.

item.title: Video: World's Largest Golf Ball Pyramid Built With 19,019 Balls

media:content.media:description: Michael Furrh, Debbie Reynolds, and Terri Janak achieved the record in Benbrook, Texas.

item.description: With a total of 19,019 golf balls used in the build, the pyramid stands as the largest of its kind.
item.content:encoded: With a total of 19,019 golf balls used in the build, the pyramid stands as the largest of its kind.

item.title: 1 Crore Bounty, Arrest Warrants: PoK's Hunt For 4 Protest Leaders

media:content.media:description: India on Tuesday strongly condemned Pakistan's actions against protesters in PoK.

item.description: This came after Pakistan launched a brutal crackdown on protesters in PoK, leading to the death of over 100 demonstrators and leaving at least 400 injured. Hundreds more have been arrested.
item.content:encoded: This came after Pakistan launched a brutal crackdown on protesters in PoK, leading to the death of over 100 demonstrators and leaving at least 400 injured. Hundreds more have been arrested.

item.title: Anthropic Opens Up Its Most Powerful AI Model To All, But There's A Catch

media:content.media:description: Pricing on both models is $10 per million input tokens and $50 per million output tokens.

item.description: Anthropic has so far limited its access to a group of about 200 organisations including the US government under the Glasswing program, after announcing in April that Mythos had uncovered thousands of software vulnerabilities.
item.content:encoded: Anthropic has so far limited its access to a group of about 200 organisations including the US government under the Glasswing program, after announcing in April that Mythos had uncovered thousands of software vulnerabilities.

item.title: 'This Is Our Finest Hour': Israeli Ambassador Celebrates Deepening Ties With India

media:content.media:description: The ambassador offered a prayer in Hebrew for peace - for Israel

item.description: Speaking before a gathering that included India's Minister of State for External Affairs Kirti Vardhan Singh, ambassadors, members of parliament, and senior diplomats, Ambassador Reuven Azar opened with a dual greeting - "Namaste and Shalom".
item.content:encoded: Speaking before a gathering that included India's Minister of State for External Affairs Kirti Vardhan Singh, ambassadors, members of parliament, and senior diplomats, Ambassador Reuven Azar opened with a dual greeting - "Namaste and Shalom".

item.title: "Must Respond": Trump Says US Apache Helicopter Was Shot Down By Iran

media:content.media:description: Trump said that the two pilots were safe and uninjured but ended the social media post with a warning

item.description: "Must Respond": Trump Says US Apache Helicopter Was Shot Down By Iran
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1110937/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>"Must Respond": Trump Says US Apache Helicopter Was Shot Down By Iran

item.title: Explained: Trump's $100,000 H-1B Visa Fee And Court Decision That Junked It

media:content.media:description: Trump last year ratched up the fee for H-1B work visas to $100,000

item.description: Many tech companies and universities rely on the H-1B program to fill openings for skilled jobs, and universities use it to lure top researchers.
item.content:encoded: Many tech companies and universities rely on the H-1B program to fill openings for skilled jobs, and universities use it to lure top researchers.

item.title: Watch: Gorilla's Human-Like Reaction After Fight With Mate Wins Internet

media:content.media:description: Kiyomasa is the son of the world-famous silverback gorilla Shabani

item.description: According to reports, the footage was captured shortly after Kiyomasa had a spat with his mate, a detail that only added fuel to the internet's imagination.
item.content:encoded: According to reports, the footage was captured shortly after Kiyomasa had a spat with his mate, a detail that only added fuel to the internet's imagination.

item.title: US Iran War Live: Trump Says US Helicopter Shot Down By Iran And US 'Must' Respond

media:content.media:description: West Asia War, US-Iran-Israel War Live Updates

item.description: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.
item.content:encoded: US Iran War LIVE Updates: Iran closed the airspace around Tehran's Imam Khomeini International Airport, the country's main airfield, after the Israeli attack.

item.title: Murder-Suicide Suspected As Indian-Origin Couple, Son Fall From London Flat

media:content.media:description: The family had been living on the 36th floor of the building

item.description: Despite attempts by paramedics to revive them, Rakesh Pai, 47, his wife Aditi Paralkar, 46, and their nine-year-old son Sid were declared dead at the scene.
item.content:encoded: Despite attempts by paramedics to revive them, Rakesh Pai, 47, his wife Aditi Paralkar, 46, and their nine-year-old son Sid were declared dead at the scene.

item.title: India Adds More Nuclear Warheads: Where Do Pakistan, China Stand?

media:content.media:description: Pakistan's stockpile remained unchanged at 170 warheads, while Israel stayed at 90.

item.description: Russia and the United States continue to dominate the global nuclear order by a wide margin. Russia holds an estimated 4,400 nuclear warheads, followed by the US with 3,700.
item.content:encoded: Russia and the United States continue to dominate the global nuclear order by a wide margin. Russia holds an estimated 4,400 nuclear warheads, followed by the US with 3,700.

item.title: After Japan, Nepal Bans Import Of Indian Mangoes Over This Issue

media:content.media:description: Nepali authorities are framing the move as an opportunity to promote domestic fruit varieties.

item.description: Before Nepal, Japan last month suspended mango imports from India after its quarantine officials found lapses in pest-control procedures at Indian treatment facilities during inspections earlier this year.
item.content:encoded: Before Nepal, Japan last month suspended mango imports from India after its quarantine officials found lapses in pest-control procedures at Indian treatment facilities during inspections earlier this year.

item.title: Protests, Poverty And Power: The Story Of Pakistan-Occupied Kashmir

media:content.media:description: Security personnel patrol a street in PoK on June 8, 2026 on the eve of JAAC's anticipated rally.

item.description: To understand PoK, one must go back to 1947. When British India was partitioned, the Indian Independence Act gave princely states three choices: join India, join Pakistan, or remain independent.
item.content:encoded: To understand PoK, one must go back to 1947. When British India was partitioned, the Indian Independence Act gave princely states three choices: join India, join Pakistan, or remain independent.

item.title: India's Nuclear Arsenal Swells To 190: Which Country Has Most Nuke Warheads

media:content.media:description: India has 12 deployed nuclear warheads and 178 stored warheads, totalling the stockpile to 190

item.description: For the first time, India has kept 12 nuclear warheads deployed during peacetime, breaking with its longstanding practice of storing warheads separately from delivery systems such as ballistic missiles, according to SIPRI.
item.content:encoded: For the first time, India has kept 12 nuclear warheads deployed during peacetime, breaking with its longstanding practice of storing warheads separately from delivery systems such as ballistic missiles, according to SIPRI.

item.title: No Trump-Putin Call Planned, No Timeline On US Envoys' Visit: Russia

media:content.media:description: The US had previously been involved in mediation efforts between Russia and Ukraine

item.description: American negotiators Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner continue to maintain contacts with both Russia and Ukraine, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said.
item.content:encoded: American negotiators Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner continue to maintain contacts with both Russia and Ukraine, Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said.

item.title: US Sanctions Alibaba, BYD, Baidu In Crackdown On Chinese Companies

media:content.media:description: The Chinese Embassy on Monday hit out at the US.

item.description: The list, updated and published Monday by the Pentagon, now sanctions well-known, non-state-owned Chinese companies that are not traditionally considered to be in the defence or security sector.
item.content:encoded: The list, updated and published Monday by the Pentagon, now sanctions well-known, non-state-owned Chinese companies that are not traditionally considered to be in the defence or security sector.

item.title: 32,000 Displaced As Buildings Reduced To Rubble In Philippines Earthquake

media:content.media:description: The Philippines is often hit by earthquakes and volcanic eruptions.

item.description: Monday's earthquake was centered at sea at a depth of 33 kilometres, about 32 kilometres southwest of Maasim town in Sarangani province.
item.content:encoded: Monday's earthquake was centered at sea at a depth of 33 kilometres, about 32 kilometres southwest of Maasim town in Sarangani province.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | The Chinese Are Using LinkedIn 'Jobs' To Spy On Countries. Is India Prepared?
item.description: A recent report throws light on how Chinese operatives frequently disguise themselves as representatives of private consultancies, research institutions, or human resource firms, posting seemingly legitimate job opportunities for foreign policy, defe
item.content:encoded: A recent report throws light on how Chinese operatives frequently disguise themselves as representatives of private consultancies, research institutions, or human resource firms, posting seemingly legitimate job opportunities for foreign policy, defe

item.title: Over 30 Dead, 200 Injured As Security Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK
item.description: Over 30 Dead, 200 Injured As Security Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK
item.content:encoded: Over 30 Dead, 200 Injured As Security Forces Open Fire On Protesters In PoK
